=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable unsafeEffectTypeAssertion for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable unsafeEffectTypeAssertion for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Remove the unsafe assertion" ===

--- file:///.src/unsafeEffectTypeAssertion.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics unsafeEffectTypeAssertion:warning
import { Effect, Layer, Stream } from "effect"

declare const program: Effect.Effect<string, "boom", "service">
declare const anyError: Effect.Effect<string, any, "service">
declare const anyRequirements: Effect.Effect<string, "boom", any>
declare const noRequirements: Effect.Effect<string, "boom", never>
declare const noError: Effect.Effect<string, never, "service">
declare const stream: Stream.Stream<string, "boom", "service">
declare const layer: Layer.Layer<"out", "boom", "service">
declare const layerNoRequirements: Layer.Layer<"out", "boom", never>
declare const layerNoError: Layer.Layer<"out", never, "service">

export const narrowsBoth = program
export const skipsAnyError = anyError as Effect.Effect<string, never, "service">
export const skipsAnyRequirements = anyRequirements as Effect.Effect<string, "boom", never>
export const safeWiden = program as Effect.Effect<string, "boom" | "other", "service">
export const narrowsRequirements = noError as Effect.Effect<string, never, never>
export const narrowsError = noRequirements as Effect.Effect<string, never, never>
export const narrowsStreamBoth = stream as Stream.Stream<string, never, never>
export const narrowsLayerBoth = layer as Layer.Layer<"out", never, never>
export const narrowsLayerRequirements = layerNoError as Layer.Layer<"out", never, never>
export const narrowsLayerError = layerNoRequirements as Layer.Layer<"out", never, never>
export const notEffect = 1 as number


=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable unsafeEffectTypeAssertion for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable unsafeEffectTypeAssertion for entire file" ===

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Remove the unsafe assertion" ===

--- file:///.src/unsafeEffectTypeAssertion.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics unsafeEffectTypeAssertion:warning
import { Effect, Layer, Stream } from "effect"

declare const program: Effect.Effect<string, "boom", "service">
declare const anyError: Effect.Effect<string, any, "service">
declare const anyRequirements: Effect.Effect<string, "boom", any>
declare const noRequirements: Effect.Effect<string, "boom", never>
declare const noError: Effect.Effect<string, never, "service">
declare const stream: Stream.Stream<string, "boom", "service">
declare const layer: Layer.Layer<"out", "boom", "service">
declare const layerNoRequirements: Layer.Layer<"out", "boom", never>
declare const layerNoError: Layer.Layer<"out", never, "service">

export const narrowsBoth = program as Effect.Effect<string, never, never>
export const skipsAnyError = anyError as Effect.Effect<string, never, "service">
export const skipsAnyRequirements = anyRequirements as Effect.Effect<string, "boom", never>
export const safeWiden = program as Effect.Effect<string, "boom" | "other", "service">
export const narrowsRequirements = noError
export const narrowsError = noRequirements as Effect.Effect<string, never, never>
export const narrowsStreamBoth = stream as Stream.Stream<string, never, never>
export const narrowsLayerBoth = layer as Layer.Layer<"out", never, never>
export const narrowsLayerRequirements = layerNoError as Layer.Layer<"out", never, never>
export const narrowsLayerError = layerNoRequirements as Layer.Layer<"out", never, never>
export const notEffect = 1 as number


=== [D3] Fix 0: "Disable unsafeEffectTypeAssertion for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 1: "Disable unsafeEffectTypeAssertion for entire file" ===

=== [D3] Fix 2: "Remove the unsafe assertion" ===

--- file:///.src/unsafeEffectTypeAssertion.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics unsafeEffectTypeAssertion:warning
import { Effect, Layer, Stream } from "effect"

declare const program: Effect.Effect<string, "boom", "service">
declare const anyError: Effect.Effect<string, any, "service">
declare const anyRequirements: Effect.Effect<string, "boom", any>
declare const noRequirements: Effect.Effect<string, "boom", never>
declare const noError: Effect.Effect<string, never, "service">
declare const stream: Stream.Stream<string, "boom", "service">
declare const layer: Layer.Layer<"out", "boom", "service">
declare const layerNoRequirements: Layer.Layer<"out", "boom", never>
declare const layerNoError: Layer.Layer<"out", never, "service">

export const narrowsBoth = program as Effect.Effect<string, never, never>
export const skipsAnyError = anyError as Effect.Effect<string, never, "service">
export const skipsAnyRequirements = anyRequirements as Effect.Effect<string, "boom", never>
export const safeWiden = program as Effect.Effect<string, "boom" | "other", "service">
export const narrowsRequirements = noError as Effect.Effect<string, never, never>
export const narrowsError = noRequirements
export const narrowsStreamBoth = stream as Stream.Stream<string, never, never>
export const narrowsLayerBoth = layer as Layer.Layer<"out", never, never>
export const narrowsLayerRequirements = layerNoError as Layer.Layer<"out", never, never>
export const narrowsLayerError = layerNoRequirements as Layer.Layer<"out", never, never>
export const notEffect = 1 as number


=== [D4] Fix 0: "Disable unsafeEffectTypeAssertion for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 1: "Disable unsafeEffectTypeAssertion for entire file" ===

=== [D4] Fix 2: "Remove the unsafe assertion" ===

--- file:///.src/unsafeEffectTypeAssertion.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics unsafeEffectTypeAssertion:warning
import { Effect, Layer, Stream } from "effect"

declare const program: Effect.Effect<string, "boom", "service">
declare const anyError: Effect.Effect<string, any, "service">
declare const anyRequirements: Effect.Effect<string, "boom", any>
declare const noRequirements: Effect.Effect<string, "boom", never>
declare const noError: Effect.Effect<string, never, "service">
declare const stream: Stream.Stream<string, "boom", "service">
declare const layer: Layer.Layer<"out", "boom", "service">
declare const layerNoRequirements: Layer.Layer<"out", "boom", never>
declare const layerNoError: Layer.Layer<"out", never, "service">

export const narrowsBoth = program as Effect.Effect<string, never, never>
export const skipsAnyError = anyError as Effect.Effect<string, never, "service">
export const skipsAnyRequirements = anyRequirements as Effect.Effect<string, "boom", never>
export const safeWiden = program as Effect.Effect<string, "boom" | "other", "service">
export const narrowsRequirements = noError as Effect.Effect<string, never, never>
export const narrowsError = noRequirements as Effect.Effect<string, never, never>
export const narrowsStreamBoth = stream
export const narrowsLayerBoth = layer as Layer.Layer<"out", never, never>
export const narrowsLayerRequirements = layerNoError as Layer.Layer<"out", never, never>
export const narrowsLayerError = layerNoRequirements as Layer.Layer<"out", never, never>
export const notEffect = 1 as number


=== [D5] Fix 0: "Disable unsafeEffectTypeAssertion for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D5] Fix 1: "Disable unsafeEffectTypeAssertion for entire file" ===

=== [D5] Fix 2: "Remove the unsafe assertion" ===

--- file:///.src/unsafeEffectTypeAssertion.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics unsafeEffectTypeAssertion:warning
import { Effect, Layer, Stream } from "effect"

declare const program: Effect.Effect<string, "boom", "service">
declare const anyError: Effect.Effect<string, any, "service">
declare const anyRequirements: Effect.Effect<string, "boom", any>
declare const noRequirements: Effect.Effect<string, "boom", never>
declare const noError: Effect.Effect<string, never, "service">
declare const stream: Stream.Stream<string, "boom", "service">
declare const layer: Layer.Layer<"out", "boom", "service">
declare const layerNoRequirements: Layer.Layer<"out", "boom", never>
declare const layerNoError: Layer.Layer<"out", never, "service">

export const narrowsBoth = program as Effect.Effect<string, never, never>
export const skipsAnyError = anyError as Effect.Effect<string, never, "service">
export const skipsAnyRequirements = anyRequirements as Effect.Effect<string, "boom", never>
export const safeWiden = program as Effect.Effect<string, "boom" | "other", "service">
export const narrowsRequirements = noError as Effect.Effect<string, never, never>
export const narrowsError = noRequirements as Effect.Effect<string, never, never>
export const narrowsStreamBoth = stream as Stream.Stream<string, never, never>
export const narrowsLayerBoth = layer
export const narrowsLayerRequirements = layerNoError as Layer.Layer<"out", never, never>
export const narrowsLayerError = layerNoRequirements as Layer.Layer<"out", never, never>
export const notEffect = 1 as number


=== [D6] Fix 0: "Disable unsafeEffectTypeAssertion for this line" ===

=== [D6] Fix 1: "Disable unsafeEffectTypeAssertion for entire file" ===

=== [D6] Fix 2: "Remove the unsafe assertion" ===

--- file:///.src/unsafeEffectTypeAssertion.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics unsafeEffectTypeAssertion:warning
import { Effect, Layer, Stream } from "effect"

declare const program: Effect.Effect<string, "boom", "service">
declare const anyError: Effect.Effect<string, any, "service">
declare const anyRequirements: Effect.Effect<string, "boom", any>
declare const noRequirements: Effect.Effect<string, "boom", never>
declare const noError: Effect.Effect<string, never, "service">
declare const stream: Stream.Stream<string, "boom", "service">
declare const layer: Layer.Layer<"out", "boom", "service">
declare const layerNoRequirements: Layer.Layer<"out", "boom", never>
declare const layerNoError: Layer.Layer<"out", never, "service">

export const narrowsBoth = program as Effect.Effect<string, never, never>
export const skipsAnyError = anyError as Effect.Effect<string, never, "service">
export const skipsAnyRequirements = anyRequirements as Effect.Effect<string, "boom", never>
export const safeWiden = program as Effect.Effect<string, "boom" | "other", "service">
export const narrowsRequirements = noError as Effect.Effect<string, never, never>
export const narrowsError = noRequirements as Effect.Effect<string, never, never>
export const narrowsStreamBoth = stream as Stream.Stream<string, never, never>
export const narrowsLayerBoth = layer as Layer.Layer<"out", never, never>
export const narrowsLayerRequirements = layerNoError
export const narrowsLayerError = layerNoRequirements as Layer.Layer<"out", never, never>
export const notEffect = 1 as number


=== [D7] Fix 0: "Disable unsafeEffectTypeAssertion for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D7] Fix 1: "Disable unsafeEffectTypeAssertion for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D7] Fix 2: "Remove the unsafe assertion" ===

--- file:///.src/unsafeEffectTypeAssertion.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics unsafeEffectTypeAssertion:warning
import { Effect, Layer, Stream } from "effect"

declare const program: Effect.Effect<string, "boom", "service">
declare const anyError: Effect.Effect<string, any, "service">
declare const anyRequirements: Effect.Effect<string, "boom", any>
declare const noRequirements: Effect.Effect<string, "boom", never>
declare const noError: Effect.Effect<string, never, "service">
declare const stream: Stream.Stream<string, "boom", "service">
declare const layer: Layer.Layer<"out", "boom", "service">
declare const layerNoRequirements: Layer.Layer<"out", "boom", never>
declare const layerNoError: Layer.Layer<"out", never, "service">

export const narrowsBoth = program as Effect.Effect<string, never, never>
export const skipsAnyError = anyError as Effect.Effect<string, never, "service">
export const skipsAnyRequirements = anyRequirements as Effect.Effect<string, "boom", never>
export const safeWiden = program as Effect.Effect<string, "boom" | "other", "service">
export const narrowsRequirements = noError as Effect.Effect<string, never, never>
export const narrowsError = noRequirements as Effect.Effect<string, never, never>
export const narrowsStreamBoth = stream as Stream.Stream<string, never, never>
export const narrowsLayerBoth = layer as Layer.Layer<"out", never, never>
export const narrowsLayerRequirements = layerNoError as Layer.Layer<"out", never, never>
export const narrowsLayerError = layerNoRequirements
export const notEffect = 1 as number
